English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Watermargin records
Watermargin (Cornell University)
Sutipornprachum, Vichian.
37-4-446
5.8 cubic feet. 5.8 cubic feet.
1947-2012. Correspondence, Manuscripts, Photographs, Legal Documents, Printed Materials Correspondence, clippings, newsletters, photographs, minutes of meetings, programs, incorporation papers pertaining to a Cornell University cooperative living unit, with particular reference to social issues and visits from Eleanor Roosevelt, Marion Anderson and Norman Thomas. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 11293 ======= 11293 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2897211
Watermargin Iron Chef Competition
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
N/A
Date completed:
N/A
EAD encoding:
Jenny Harrison, February 2006
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, January 2019
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Co-op founded as a non-discriminatory fraternity.
Cite As:
Watermargin records, #37-4-446. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Correspondence, clippings, newsletters, photographs, minutes of meetings, programs, incorporation papers pertaining to a Cornell University cooperative living unit, with particular reference to social issues and visits from Eleanor Roosevelt, Marian Anderson, and Norman Thomas. Also "103 McGraw Place," a documentary film about the Watermargin house, by Wei (Vichian Sutipornprachum), 2009.
Restrictions on Use:
Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage.
Restrictions on Use:
Audio visual media that has been digitized: V-11293
Related Materials
See also Watermargin miscellaneous publications call number: LD1376.5 .W32.
Photographs. Student cooperatives -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Cooperative societies -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Roosevelt, Eleanor, 1884-1962. Anderson, Marian R. (Marion Roberta), 1897-1993. Thomas, Norman, 1884-1968. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Societies, etc.

Scope and Contents
"Sixty years after Watermargin's founding, Wei (Cornell '02) tracked down the surviving founders and several first generation alumni in order to document their stories and accomplishments of the beloved house located on Ithaca's 103 McGraw Place."Watermargin - Origins - Incorporation194721Certificate of Incorporation22Origins - Constitution, meaning of the name194823Correspondence, Eleanor Roosevelt's visit, memoranda1947-195724Foundation/Fundraising1949-195225Early House Operations1949-195226Correspondence194827Brochures28Brochures29Conference committee information1953210Conference - publicity, information1949-1950211Conference - "Inter-Group Living and the College Campus"1950212Conference - personal correspondence213Applications for those attending the Watermargin Conference and Correspondence1948-1950214Conference material215Conference - correspondence1949-1950216Conference - Sourcebook, Session Minutes, PublicityFebruary 18-20, 1950217Conference Correspondence - from other universities1952-1953218College Exchange Weekend Committee1952-1953219Farm Weekend1968220Education Committee Correspondence1940's-1960's221Speaker Series1950's-1960222Langston Hughes - Programs, signed book The Dream Keeper223Scott Hamilton's correspondence1950's224Field Trips - Arkansas and NYC and bound copy of "Watermargin Arkansas Study Trip"1950-1951225Education Committee Correspondence1951-19631980's-1990's226Social Activities1950's-1980's227Intergroup Relations in Ithaca228House Activities - Blood Bank1950's-1960's229Publications Committee Reports1940's230Special Projects Committee231Committees - Nominating, Dedication, Communications, Secretarial, etc.1950's232"In the Margin" - publication1948-1953233"In the Margin"1954-1956234"In the Margin"; Scope and Contents
